_note: Top 50 target companies for job discovery watchlist. All careers_url values are verified reachable (HTTP 200). scrape_method=direct means we hit careers_url directly. scrape_method=linkedin means the careers page blocks scrapers — use the linkedin_slug for company page jobs instead.
